act_title: PUBLIC AUTHORITIES (CONTROL OF BORROWING POWERS) ACT 1961
content:
[Sections 2 and 5]
1. The Municipal Council of Penang Island.
*2. Malacca Historical City Municipal Council.
**3. The Municipal Council of Kota Setar.

act_title: PUBLIC AUTHORITIES (CONTROL OF BORROWING POWERS) ACT 1961
content:
**3. The Municipal Council of Kota Setar.
4. The Municipal Council of Sungai Petani.

act_title: PUBLIC AUTHORITIES (CONTROL OF BORROWING POWERS) ACT 1961
content:
5. The Municipal Council of Klang.
***6. The Municipal Council of Province Wellesley.

act_title: PUBLIC AUTHORITIES (CONTROL OF BORROWING POWERS) ACT 1961
content:
***6. The Municipal Council of Province Wellesley.
7. The Commissioner of the City of Kuala Lumpur.
* NOTE—The Malacca Historical City Municipal Council is now known as the Malacca Historic
City Council–see the Malacca Historic City Council Enactment 2003 [Malacca Enactment No.
2 of 2003].
** NOTE—The Municipal Council of Kota Setar is now known as the Alor Star City Council–
see the Notification Under Section 4 of the Local Government Act 1976 [K. P.U. 9/2003].
*** NOTE—The Municipal Council of Province Wellesley  is now known as the Seberang Perai
Municipal Council–see the Local Government Act 1976 [Act 171].
7
Public Authorities (Control of  Borrowing Powers)
